basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 166 Anganwadi Worker Posts in Barabanki District
basic_details.short_information: The District Program Officer, Barabanki has invited online applications for 166 Anganwadi Karyakatri (Anganwadi Worker) posts under the Integrated Child Development Programme (ICDS) in Uttar Pradesh. These are contract-based posts on honorarium, filled as per Government Order No. /2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687) dated 17 September 2025, following approval from the District Magistrate. Only female candidates are eligible to apply. Applications must be submitted online at upanganwadibharti.in by 4 August 2026.

application_fee.details: Not specified. No application fee details are mentioned in the source notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 35 years Cut-off date for age calculation: 1 July 2026 Age will be determined strictly as per the date of birth recorded in the High School mark sheet/certificate

qualification.details: Only female candidates are eligible for these posts | Minimum qualification: Intermediate (12th) or its equivalent Merit will be prepared considering educational qualification up to Postgraduate level

salary_details.details: The post is contract-based on honorarium (मानदेय). The specific honorarium amount is not specified in this notification.

selection_process: Selection will follow the procedure laid out in Government Order No. /2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687) dated 17 September 2025. Key preference rules specified in the notification:

Two women from the same family cannot be appointed to the posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika (helper) One woman cannot apply for more than one center or post Within the same gram sabha/ward (or urban area)
preference in appointment is given first to women living below the poverty line; if such women are unavailable
and then to legally divorced or deserted women living below the poverty line If no woman living below the poverty line is available in the applicant's own gram sabha/ward
eligible women living below the poverty line from the same category residing above the poverty line follow next in the preference order
then widows and divorced/deserted women above the poverty line
as detailed in the notification Final selection decisions rest with the higher authorities and the selection committee
Not specified: whether there is any written test or interview; the notification describes a merit- and preference-based selection only.
how_to_apply: Visit the official recruitment portal: upanganwadibharti.in
Read the detailed notification, eligibility criteria and project-wise vacancy list published on the portal
Fill the online application form in the prescribed format with accurate personal, educational, income, residence and caste details
If claiming widow, divorced, or deserted status, mark this category explicitly in the online form - claims not marked online will not be considered
Upload self-attested, clean, legible scanned copies of all required documents as referenced in the form
Submit the application within the prescribed window, by 4 August 2026
important_instructions: Applications will be accepted only online, within the prescribed period, through upanganwadibharti.in; no offline or postal application/documents will be accepted Any error in facts, figures, or educational records, or any incorrect/forged income, caste, or residence certificate, can lead to rejection of candidature by the selection committee; the applicant alone is responsible for such rejection The applicant is solely responsible for correctly entering marks/percentage of educational records and income, caste and residence certificate details in the online form Detailed eligibility, application procedure and the governing order are available on the departmental website, and information can also be obtained from the Child Development Project Office, Vikas Bhavan, or the District Program Officer's office on working days Decisions and directions issued by higher authorities, and decisions of the selection committee, will be treated as final The number of vacant posts shown in the table is subject to increase or decrease based on the department's status

content_sections.heading: Barabanki Anganwadi Karyakatri Notification
content_sections.text: Complete details of eligibility, project-wise and category-wise vacancies, and the application procedure are available on the departmental website: upanganwadibharti.in . UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Barabanki Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026: Quick Overview
Barabanki Anganwadi Karyakatri Vacancy Details: Project-wise and Category-wise
content_sections.text: Note: the source notification marks the Unreserved figure for Ramnagar (7) with an asterisk; no corresponding footnote text is legible in the source document, so the reason for the marking is not specified.

content_sections.heading: Barabanki Anganwadi Karyakatri Eligibility
content_sections.text: Only female candidates are eligible for these posts Minimum qualification: Intermediate (12th) or its equivalent Merit will be prepared considering educational qualification up to Postgraduate level

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 35 years Cut-off date for age calculation: 1 July 2026 Age will be determined strictly as per the date of birth recorded in the High School mark sheet/certificate

content_sections.heading: Selection Process and Preference Criteria
content_sections.text: Selection will follow the procedure laid out in Government Order No. /2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687) dated 17 September 2025. Key preference rules specified in the notification: Two women from the same family cannot be appointed to the posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika (helper) One woman cannot apply for more than one center or post Within the same gram sabha/ward (or urban area), preference in appointment is given first to women living below the poverty line; if such women are unavailable, preference moves to widows, and then to legally divorced or deserted women living below the poverty line If no woman living below the poverty line is available in the applicant's own gram sabha/ward, eligible women living below the poverty line from the same category residing above the poverty line follow next in the preference order, then widows and divorced/deserted women above the poverty line, as detailed in the notification Final selection decisions rest with the higher authorities and the selection committee Not specified: whether there is any written test or interview; the notification describes a merit- and preference-based selection only.

content_sections.heading: Remuneration
content_sections.text: The post is contract-based on honorarium (मानदेय). The specific honorarium amount is not specified in this notification.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Not specified. No application fee details are mentioned in the source notification.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Residence certificate clearly mentioning Gram Panchayat/Ward Income, residence and caste certificates - only those digitally signed online by the Tehsil and online-verifiable are accepted; they must be issued in the applicant's own name Income certificate as per U.P. Government Revenue Department Order No. 3959/1-9-11-Raj0-9 dated 30-09-2011 (as amended) For widow candidates: death certificate issued by the Gram Panchayat officer or concerned Nagar Nikay, or a certified copy of the Voter List, is acceptable as proof For divorced/deserted women: a valid legal court order is required as proof Self-attested, clean and legible scanned copies of all documents referenced in the online form (only online submissions accepted; no offline or postal documents will be considered)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Barabanki Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official recruitment portal: upanganwadibharti.in Read the detailed notification, eligibility criteria and project-wise vacancy list published on the portal Fill the online application form in the prescribed format with accurate personal, educational, income, residence and caste details If claiming widow, divorced, or deserted status, mark this category explicitly in the online form - claims not marked online will not be considered Upload self-attested, clean, legible scanned copies of all required documents as referenced in the form Submit the application within the prescribed window, by 4 August 2026

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications will be accepted only online, within the prescribed period, through upanganwadibharti.in; no offline or postal application/documents will be accepted Any error in facts, figures, or educational records, or any incorrect/forged income, caste, or residence certificate, can lead to rejection of candidature by the selection committee; the applicant alone is responsible for such rejection The applicant is solely responsible for correctly entering marks/percentage of educational records and income, caste and residence certificate details in the online form Detailed eligibility, application procedure and the governing order are available on the departmental website, and information can also be obtained from the Child Development Project Office, Vikas Bhavan, or the District Program Officer's office on working days Decisions and directions issued by higher authorities, and decisions of the selection committee, will be treated as final The number of vacant posts shown in the table is subject to increase or decrease based on the department's status

faq.question: Q1. How many Anganwadi Karyakatri posts are vacant in Barabanki?
faq.answer: 166 posts are vacant across 16 rural/urban projects in Barabanki district.

faq.question: Q2. Who can apply for the Anganwadi Karyakatri post?
faq.answer: Only female candidates are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for Barabanki Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application closes on 4 August 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: A minimum of Intermediate (12th) or its equivalent; merit is prepared considering qualifications up to Postgraduate level.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Minimum 18 years and maximum 35 years, as on the cut-off date of 1 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Can two women from the same family apply for Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika posts?
faq.answer: No. Two women from one family cannot be appointed to the posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika.
